explanation: The provided C code defines several functions for sorting and manipulating an array of integers. It allows the user to input a set of numbers, which can then be sorted using different algorithms. Specifically, the code includes implementations for insertion sort and selection sort, although the main functionality focuses on creating and managing a binary heap. The heap operations, such as insertion, extraction of the maximum, and re-structuring the heap, are also defined, demonstrating the use of heaps for efficient sorting and priority management.
name: 2009-06-30_unnamed
subject: Types of Sorting etc.
summary: This project implements various sorting algorithms, including insertion sort, selection sort, and heap sort, as well as a simple heap management system.
